meta.title: Stay at Farm El Baya - The Baya Room Under Olive Trees
meta.description: A private room on a permaculture farm in Testour. Private bathroom, direct rate from 180 DT/night, farm breakfast and meals on request.

hero: A private room under the olive trees.
intro: One private room - the Baya Room - with its own bathroom, its own light, and its own quiet. Farm breakfast is available each morning (20 DT). This is not a hotel. It is a living farm that welcomes one stay at a time.

breakfast.heading: What breakfast looks like
breakfast.text: Add a farm breakfast to any morning (20 DT). Farm eggs cooked fresh. Olive oil pressed from trees you can see from your window. Homemade yogurt. Pomegranate seeds. Tunisian flatbreads. Seasonal fruit. Juice. This is how the day begins here.

cabin.label: COMING SOON
cabin.heading: The Olive Cabin
cabin.text: A standalone cabin being built among the olive trees. Private. Quiet. Its own outdoor kitchen. Its own sky. Join the list to be first to know.

nearby.heading: Nearby - beyond the farm
items: Testour town - 15 min · Pomegranates, Andalusian heritage, local market
Dougga - 20-40 min · UNESCO Roman city, one of North Africa's best preserved
